name: Phrenetic Shooting Reunion
short_description: [CONTENTS] A playable shooting game "PHRENETIC SHOOTING REUNION" + All future updates/bug fixes. Phrenetic Shooting is a retro tasted shooting game. This game provides an exciting experience for retro 2D shooting game funs.
detailed_description:
[CONTENTS]

  • A shooting game body (6 Stages of 2D Shooting game for single player.)

  • All future updates/bug fixes.

[ABOUT]

Phrenetic Shooting is a retro tasted shooting game which is consisted with 6 stages of full of bullet avoiding pleasure. This game provides an exciting experience for retro 2D shooting game funs. The pleasure should not only be excitement but also nostalgy since the game is redeveloped and is modernized based on Phrenetic Shooting Third Mission which was distributed exclusively in 1991 Japan Summer Comic Market.
